headline: Cabo Verde FIRST BASELINE (rotation substitute) — Published 62.5 Established confirmed. One of Africa's most stable democracies; consistent peaceful elections; strong press freedom (top RSF Africa ranks); 2018 decriminalization of homelessness; comprehensive HIV/AIDS response. Climate-vulnerability structural drag (Sahelian drought, sea-level rise). Net assessment: confirm at 62.5 Established.

scoring_rationale.BND: 4 unchanged. Strong institutional boundaries; clean transitions.

key_evidence: One of Africa's most stable democracies (consistent peaceful elections since 1991 multiparty transition).
Strong press freedom — RSF top Africa ranking.
Climate-vulnerability structural drag (Sahelian drought, sea-level rise).

evidence.finding: 62.5 Established placement reflects stable democratic governance and press freedom.

positiveSignals: Democratic stability since 1991; press freedom ranking; HIV/AIDS response.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
